CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS test_db;
CREATE TABLE test_db.test_table (id UInt32, name String, age UInt8);
CREATE TABLE test_db.nested_table (id UInt32, details Nested(metric String, value Float32));
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT hasColumnInTable('test_db', 'test_table', 'age') UNION SELECT hasColumnInTable('test_db', 'nested_table', 'non_existing_metric'));
SELECT hasColumnInTable('test_db', (SELECT name FROM test_db.test_table WHERE id = 1), 'name');
SELECT hasColumnInTable('test_db', 'test_table', 'id') AS id_exists, hasColumnInTable('test_db', 'test_table', 'age') AS age_exists;
SELECT hasColumnInTable('test_db', 'test_table', (SELECT 'age' FROM test_db.test_table WHERE id = 2));
CREATE TABLE test_db.test_table (id UInt32, first_name String, last_name String, birthdate Date);
